name: SentinelOne Singularity XDR
description: This plugin is used to fetch Devices (Endpoints) from the Inventory > Endpoints page, Users (Identity) from the Inventory > Identity page, and Applications from the Vulnerabilities page from the SentinelOne Singularity XDR platform. The plugin supports performing Manage Device Tags, Move Device to Group, Isolate/Undo Isolate, Update Asset Criticality, Run Scan and Reboot Device actions on Devices. The plugin supports performing Update Asset Criticality action on Users.

configuration.label: Base URL
configuration.description: Base URL of the SentinelOne instance. e.g. https://your-tenant.sentinelone.net

configuration.label: API Token
configuration.description: API token to authenticate SentinelOne. API Token can be generated from 'My Profile > Actions > API Token Operations > Generate API Token'.

configuration.label: Site Name
configuration.description: Name of the SentinelOne site to fetch assets from. Navigate to 'Policies and settings > Scopes > Sites' page to get the Site Name. Only one Site Name value is allowed.
